name: NorthIsle Copper and Gold Inc.
description: NorthIsle Copper and Gold Inc. is a Canadian-based junior mineral exploration and development company focused on its 100%-owned North Island Project, located on Northern Vancouver Island, British Columbia. The company is dedicated to the sustainable exploration and development of its extensive 34,000-hectare mineral tenure, which hosts significant copper-gold porphyry deposits. By leveraging its strategic location and commitment to responsible resource development, NorthIsle aims to advance its projects toward production, contributing to the supply of essential metals like copper, gold, molybdenum, and rhenium while maintaining high standards of environmental and social governance.
